SHORT NAME: RSTRCTD_BNFTS_CD_LTST 

LONG NAME: RSTRCTD_BNFTS_CD_LTST 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0 = Individual is not eligible for Medicaid or Children’s Health Insurance Program (CHIP) during the 
month. 

1 = Individual is eligible for Medicaid or CHIP and entitled to the full scope of Medicaid or CHIP 
benefits. 

2 = Individual is eligible for Medicaid or Medicaid-Expansion CHIP,
